title: Project Redev
description: Bringing the classic ideology back to modern Minecraft
body: -------------------------------------------------------------------------- Spearheaded by Maverick in collaboration with [Momo Softworks](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mikul/projects), ReDev aims to course-correct the development path of Minecraft and shape it into the game it should be: a creative and challenging sandbox adventure. ReDev not only adds tons of fitting new features, but also replaces, redesigns, and removes parts of the base game to create the definitive Minecraft experience. ![egypt-1](https://imgur.com/dOmcwSU.png) ![egypt-2](https://imgur.com/Yi4Ajft.png) ![random-tree](https://imgur.com/TCMK3sm.png) ![cave-png](https://imgur.com/gBEM4B6.png) ![stone-lad](https://imgur.com/WLwEStH.png) ![ender-entrance](https://imgur.com/4BhQVvv.png) ![ender-spoopy](https://imgur.com/arRXL7T.png) ![ender-library-no-cool-books](https://imgur.com/htsUKfC.png) ![random-furnaces](https://imgur.com/aWITjcQ.png) ![bookshelves-in-multiple-colors](https://imgur.com/Fs9c6V4.png) ![plains-i-guess](https://imgur.com/pCzlc8a.png) ![nether-tree](https://imgur.com/srXlVte.png) ![blazes-but-cool](https://imgur.com/vLLjCh6.png)
